fundamentals.name: iShares Silver Trust
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The Trust seeks to reflect such performance before payment of the Trust's expenses and liabilities. It is not actively managed. The Trust does not engage in any activities designed to obtain a profit from, or to ameliorate losses caused by, changes in the price of silver.

news.paragraph: The iShares Silver ETF (SLV) is under scrutiny following a significant 35% decline, prompting questions about its current investment appeal. Meanwhile, Selvita, a company potentially related to the silver market or a component within the ETF, reported its Q1 2026 results and initiated a review of its strategic options. The confluence of a sharp ETF pullback and a corporate strategic review suggests potential volatility and uncertainty for investors.

headlines.title: Should You Buy the iShares Silver ETF After Its 35% Plunge? Here's What Could Happen Next.
Selvita reports Q1 2026 results and launches strategic options review

examples.body: $SLV time for another squeeze…. Lets go

$SLV as things stand, there is a massive wall at 70 and no strong support below. Ideally, I'd love a retest of that area to take this further down.
$SLV miners up / spot down. Primed for explosion upward eow
$SLV relative strength against $GLD should be noted. $SI_F $75.6 23.6% fib test is on deck for this week. Tested multiple times last week. Short term bearish
